description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang-tidy that runs on push and pull request events. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a Debian container, checking out the code and running meson and ninja to generate necessary build files. Then, use the cpp-linter/cpp-linter-action to run clang-tidy checks on changed files and lines, using the .clang-tidy configuration and a compile_commands.json database. If any checks fail, print an error message and exit with a non-zero status.
